headline: Is It Too Late To Reassess Citigroup (C) After Its 109% One Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Citigroup is still reasonably priced after its recent run, the stock’s current level invites a closer look at what you are actually paying for. The share price most recently closed at US$131.68, with returns of 1.6% over 7 days, 20.2% over 30 days, 10.9% year to date, 109.3% over 1 year, 205.2% over 3 years, and 115.0% over 5 years. Recent coverage around Citigroup has focused on its position as a major US bank, its global footprint, and the market’s shifting...

headline: Citi Enhances Citigold Private Client Experience with Education Planning Partnerships
summary: Citi is partnering with leading education consultancies, Crimson Education and Onwards Education Consultancy, to provide Citigold Private Client customers with access to international education planning services for entry to international schools and top-tier universities.

headline: Deutsche Telekom Weighs Full Combination With T-Mobile
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Deutsche Telekom AG is discussing a potential combination with its American arm T-Mobile US Inc., people familiar with the matter said, a move that would create the world’s biggest phone company and set a record for public M&A. headline: Is It Worth Investing in Citigroup (C) Based on Wall Street's Bullish Views?
